title: Protein pellet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Protein pellets''' were a crunchy, tasteless type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]], often used for travel or a quick meal. It was often eaten by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], [[Weequay/Legends|Weequays]] and [[Gran/Legends|Grans]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]''
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]''

[[Category:Rodian food]]
[[Category:Synthetic food]]
